x-artifact.note: Design-first artifact only — describes the MCP tool surface, not a running server. Tool input/output schemas $ref the same object schemas as the OpenAPI; each tool maps to an OpenAPI operationId. Consolidates the read-heavy DOHMH Open Data (restaurant/rodent/childcare inspections, complaints) with the siloed transactional systems (ABC Eats, eVital/VitalChek, Accela) behind one agent contract; adds the net-new write workflow, ordering a vital record.

server.name: io.nyc.dohmh
server.title: NYC Health (DOHMH)
server.description: Agent-native access to the NYC Department of Health and Mental Hygiene — restaurant grades & inspections, rodent inspections, childcare centers, clinics, and public-health complaints. Fronts NYC Open Data for the read-heavy records and the ABC Eats grade lookup; adds ordering and tracking of birth/death certificates (today locked in eVital/VitalChek).
server.instructions: Use find_food_establishments / get_food_establishment (and get_food_establishment_inspections) for restaurant grades and inspection history — the city's most-consumed dataset. find_inspections searches inspections across establishments. find_rodent_inspections answers 'are there rat signs at this address?'. find_childcare_centers covers permitted daycares and their violation rates. find_health_facilities locates DOHMH clinics by service and location. find_complaints surfaces indoor environmental complaints. order_vital_record (net-new) and track_vital_record_request require an authenticated user; order_vital_record mutates state and places a paid order — confirm all details with the user before submitting.

tools.name: find_food_establishments
tools.title: Find Food Establishments
tools.description: Search NYC restaurants / food establishments by borough, cuisine, current letter grade, ZIP, or free text.

tools.name: get_food_establishment
tools.title: Get Food Establishment
tools.description: Fetch a food establishment (name, address, current grade) by CAMIS id.

tools.name: get_food_establishment_inspections
tools.title: Get Establishment Inspections
tools.description: List the full inspection history (scores, grades, violations) for a food establishment by CAMIS.

tools.name: find_inspections
tools.title: Find Inspections
tools.description: Search food-establishment inspections by CAMIS, critical-only, and/or date range.

tools.name: find_rodent_inspections
tools.title: Find Rodent Inspections
tools.description: Search DOHMH rat/rodent inspections by borough, result, tax lot (BBL), or date range ('are there rat signs at this address?').

tools.name: find_childcare_centers
tools.title: Find Childcare Centers
tools.description: Search permitted group childcare centers by borough, program type, status, or free text; includes violation-rate outcomes.

tools.name: find_health_facilities
tools.title: Find Health Facilities & Clinics
tools.description: Locate DOHMH clinics and service sites (sexual health, immunization, TB, mental health) by service category, borough, proximity, or free text.

tools.name: find_complaints
tools.title: Find Health Complaints
tools.description: Search indoor environmental / public-health complaints (mold, air quality, pests, lead) by borough, type, status, or date range.

tools.name: order_vital_record
tools.title: Order Birth/Death Certificate
tools.description: Order a certified copy of a NYC birth or death certificate. NET-NEW workflow with no open API today (locked in eVital VRRTS / VitalChek). Requires an authenticated user, places a paid order, and mutates state — confirm all subject, requester, and delivery details with the user before submitting.

tools.name: track_vital_record_request
tools.title: Track Vital Record Request
tools.description: Fetch the status of a previously placed birth/death certificate order by request id. Requires an authenticated user.
